LanguageData.VQE_ReactivateDesc: Reactivate the drone. A colonist will need to approach the drone and flick it back on.
LanguageData.VQE_EnterStandbyDesc: Initiate the stand-by mode. The drone will turn off, reducing the lifespan loss by 90%. It will not respond to any tasks or damage, and will need to be reactivated before it can engage again.
LanguageData.VQE_CannotUseConnectionTimedOut: Cannot use while connection timed out
LanguageData.VQE_HardcrashLetterDesc:
{DRONE} is undergoing the hardcrash malfunction.

It will try to clear sensor obstruction by repeatedly crashing into buildings and furniture, potentially destroying them in the process.

This has occurred because {DRONE} is reaching the end of its lifespan.
LanguageData.VQE_KillswitchLetterDesc:
{DRONE} is undergoing the killswitch malfunction.

It will attack anyone that gets close to it.

This has occurred because {DRONE} is reaching the end of its lifespan.
LanguageData.VQE_SelfDecommissionLetterDesc:
{DRONE} is undergoing the self-decommission malfunction.

It has determined that its service life has ended and will ignore all commands as it leaves the local area to shut down somewhere in the wild.

This has occurred because {DRONE} is reaching the end of its lifespan.
LanguageData.VQE_DroneMalfunction_Death: , after which it will cease to work.
